summary:
The most appropriate answer based on current knowledge suggests re-evaluating whether xylene truly surpasses every potential competitor regarding both safety and effectiveness when dissolved as a guttapercha endodontic sealer; thus, an alternate solution may warrant consideration depending upon more granular toxicological assessments if available. To conclude succinctly while adhering strictly within two-sentence limit per instruction request,

The optimal choice seems nuanced requiring further precise toxico-dynamic evaluations before definitively endorsing any single compound above rest despite strong indications favoring certain candidates such as xylene primarily owing to broader applicational ease alongside adequate performance characteristics necessary during root canal treatments utilizing obturation techniques involving
